nasb.text: Then the disciples *came and *said to Him, “Do You know that the Pharisees were offended when they heard this statement?”

esv.text: Then the disciples came and said to him, “Do you know that the Pharisees were offended when they heard this saying?”

cnv.text: 門徒前來告訴他：“法利賽人聽了這話很生氣，你知道嗎？”

ccb.text: 门徒上前对祂说：“你知道吗？法利赛人听见你的话很反感。”

csbs.text: 那时，门徒们前来对他说：“法利赛人听了这话很反感，你知道吗？”
